meaning: adj.大胆的,卤莽的,大胆创新的
examples: He was known for risky tactics that ranged from audacious to outrageous.
It's the latest turn in the unwinding of one of the most audacious promises of the 20th century.
You been into some other audacious mischief when I wasn't around, like enough.
Keep Crazy Audacious Goals: My aspiration was to write software and become a successful programmer.
Audacious is the fourth of the seven Astute Class submarines being built for the Royal Navy.
